title: Sugar-Free Shiitake Crunch
description: A crispy and flavorful weeknight dish featuring umami-rich shiitake mushrooms that are air-fried to perfection, making it a perfect sugar-free option for Arabian cuisine.
instructions: Clean the shiitake mushrooms, remove the stems, and slice them into thin rounds.
In a shallow dish, combine flour, olive oil, and salt. Add the sliced shiitake mushrooms to coat evenly with the flour mixture.
Transfer the coated shiitakes to your preheated air fryer basket or tray and cook for about 10-12 minutes until golden brown and crispy.
For added texture, sprinkle croutons over the top just before serving if desired.
